metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for staged, evidence-driven audits of zero-knowledge systems and cryptographic protocols.

plugins.name: crypto-audit-router
plugins.description: Routes end-to-end ZK and cryptographic audits across context building, spec-delta review, domain auditors, verification, reporting, and index usage.

plugins.name: audit-common
plugins.description: Shared severity, testing-evidence, and finding-contract references for ZK and cryptographic audit skills.

plugins.name: crypto-audit-context
plugins.description: Builds initial audit context for ZK and cryptographic code before vulnerability hunting by applying dimensional analysis, threat-model mapping, and audit prioritization.

plugins.name: spec-delta-checker
plugins.description: Checks cryptographic implementations against their reference specifications or papers and treats implementation deltas as first-class audit targets.

plugins.name: zk-circuit-auditor
plugins.description: Audits ZK circuit and verifier implementations for soundness, transcript, setup, and recursion bugs across Groth16, PLONKish, Halo2, Circom, Noir, and related proof systems.

plugins.name: cairo-auditor
plugins.description: Audits Cairo and Starknet smart contracts for hint validation, felt252 overflow, builtin misuse, and Sierra-to-CASM soundness gaps.

plugins.name: noir-auditor
plugins.description: Audits Noir circuits for unconstrained function boundary safety, oracle validation, Brillig/ACIR consistency, and witness generation soundness.

plugins.name: zkvm-auditor
plugins.description: Audits zkVM programs for memory consistency, continuation proof soundness, precompile safety, and guest-host boundary violations across SP1, RISC Zero, and Valida.

plugins.name: hash-function-auditor
plugins.description: Audits ZK-friendly hash functions (Poseidon, Rescue, MiMC, Pedersen) for parameter selection, sponge construction, domain separation, and algebraic attack resistance.

plugins.name: commitment-scheme-auditor
plugins.description: Audits polynomial commitment schemes (KZG, FRI, IPA, Pedersen) for degree bound enforcement, evaluation proof verification, trusted setup provenance, and batch opening soundness.

plugins.name: merkle-tree-auditor
plugins.description: Audits Merkle tree implementations for second-preimage attacks, leaf-node domain separation, sparse tree edge cases, and proof verification soundness.

plugins.name: fiat-shamir-auditor
plugins.description: Audits Fiat-Shamir transcript implementations for completeness, domain separation, challenge derivation order, and public input binding across interactive-to-non-interactive proof transforms.

plugins.name: kani-harness-gen
plugins.description: Generates Kani proof harnesses for Rust cryptographic code to formally verify field arithmetic, no-panic guarantees, serialization roundtrips, and constraint soundness. User-triggered only.

plugins.name: fuzz-harness-gen
plugins.description: Generates cargo-fuzz targets for Rust cryptographic code to find crashes, panics, and edge cases in deserialization, point operations, proof verification, and hash functions. User-triggered only.

plugins.name: ecc-pairing-auditor
plugins.description: Audits elliptic-curve, pairing, and BLS verification code for point-validation, subgroup, cofactor, pairing-equation, DST, and batch-verification bugs.

plugins.name: dkg-threshold-auditor
plugins.description: Audits DKG, threshold-signature, and FROST/MuSig-style protocols for rogue-key, nonce-binding, share-verification, session-isolation, and reconstruction bugs.

plugins.name: gnark-auditor
plugins.description: Audits gnark circuits and Go witness flows for frontend/backend mismatch, public witness exposure, constraint API misuse, and serialization boundary errors.

plugins.name: encryption-scheme-auditor
plugins.description: Audits encryption implementations for AEAD nonce handling, padding oracle behavior, associated-data binding, key-derivation misuse, and decrypt-error side effects.

plugins.name: mpc-auditor
plugins.description: Audits MPC implementations for garbled-circuit integrity, OT misuse, share validation, Beaver triple authenticity, and transcript/session binding.

plugins.name: vdf-auditor
plugins.description: Audits VDF implementations for sequentiality assumptions, Wesolowski/Pietrzak verifier soundness, challenge derivation, and modulus/group setup integrity.

plugins.name: lattice-auditor
plugins.description: Audits lattice-based cryptography for LWE parameter selection, noise sampling correctness, rejection-sampling safety, and decryption failure probability assumptions.

plugins.name: fhe-auditor
plugins.description: Audits FHE implementations for noise-budget accounting, bootstrapping correctness, modulus switching safety, plaintext leakage, and key-switch parameter integrity.

plugins.name: side-channel-auditor
plugins.description: Audits implementations for timing, cache, memory-access, and power-analysis leakage patterns, including compiler and feature-flag regressions that break constant-time assumptions.

plugins.name: dependency-auditor
plugins.description: Audits cryptographic dependency sets for known-vulnerable versions, security-significant feature flags, advisory coverage, transitive risk, and stale forks across arkworks, bellman, halo2, circomlib, and related ecosystems.

plugins.name: formal-verification-bridge
plugins.description: Bridges audit findings into external formal-verification tools such as Ecne, Picus, and Circomspect, with explicit environment checks and tool-specific handoff contracts.

plugins.name: rust-crypto-safety
plugins.description: Audits Rust cryptographic implementations for constant-time behavior, zeroization, panic and overflow hazards, unsafe code soundness, feature-flag risk, and dependency hygiene.

plugins.name: crypto-fp-check
plugins.description: Verifies suspected ZK and cryptographic findings before reporting by applying explicit verification gates, severity discipline, and PoC requirements.

plugins.name: crypto-report-writer
plugins.description: Writes crypto audit findings and summaries using the framework severity model and a consistent test-evidence section for ZK and cryptographic reviews.

plugins.name: zkbugs-index
plugins.description: Queryable index of real-world ZKP vulnerabilities from community-confirmed upstream sources and organization findings. Provides fast lookup by DSL, vulnerability type, and semantic similarity for use during ZK circuit audits.
